meta.title: Hallall Burger — Halal Fast Food in Peja
meta.description: The best halal burgers in Peja. Beef Patty Burger, Chicken Burger, Banjalluqki, Mix Burger. 100% certified halal.

hero.label: Hero
hero.title: Hallall Burger
hero.subtitle: The taste your heart loves — fresh halal

about.title:
Made with heart,
served with pride
about.desc1: Hallall Burger is Peja's destination for delicious burgers made with the finest halal ingredients. Every patty is prepared fresh — every bite is a true experience.
about.desc2: Located in the heart of Peja on Mehmet Akif Street, we believe good food brings people together. Fair prices, high quality — every time.

order.title: How to Order
order.desc: Getting your Hallall burger is simple. Visit our shop and we'll take care of the rest.
order.step1Desc: Come to Mehmet Akif 45, Peja and walk right in
order.step2Desc: Pick your burger, sides and drinks
order.step3Desc: Cooked fresh to order, served hot
